text: Iran's Ghalibaf on failed negotiations with the U.S. in Pakistan: We have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experience of two previous wars, we do not trust the other side. The other side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations America has understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for it to decide whether it can earn our trust or not. We consider ‘power diplomacy’ another method alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫谈及在巴基斯坦与美国谈判失败时表示：我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于两次战争的经验，我们不信任对方。对方最终未能在此轮谈判中赢得伊朗代表团的信任。美国已经理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是它决定能否赢得我们信任的时候了。我们认为‘权力外交’是与军事斗争并行的另一种维护伊朗民族权利的方法。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said that after 21 hours of intense talks in Islamabad, the U.S. failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. “America understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for them to decide whether they can earn our trust,” he stated. Ghalibaf noted that Iran had good faith and will, but due to the experience of two previous wars, there is no trust in the US. He described “diplomacy of power” as another path alongside military struggle to secure Iran’s rights. He thanked Pakistan for facilitating the talks and praised the Iranian people for their support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的紧张会谈后，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。他表示：“美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是他们决定能否赢得我们信任的时候了。”卡利巴夫指出，伊朗怀有善意和意愿，但由于两次战争的经验，对美国没有信任。他将“权力外交”描述为与军事斗争并行、维护伊朗权利的另一条途径。他感谢巴基斯坦为会谈提供的便利，并赞扬了伊朗人民的支持。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left Tehran skeptical. — Iran’s delegation presented forward-looking initiatives, yet the other side ultimately could not build confidence. — The US now understands Iran’s principles and must decide whether it can gain Iran’s trust. — Iran views “power diplomacy” as a key tool alongside military resistance to secure the nation’s rights, and will not stop working to consolidate the achievements of its 40 days of national defense. — Grateful to 'friendly and brotherly' Pakistan for hosting. — Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank all the heroic people of Iran who, following the advice of the Supreme Leader and by being present in the streets, supported their children and accompanied us with their prayers, and I say well done to my colleagues in these intense 21-hour negotiations. Long live and prosper dear Iran!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：— 尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗带着诚意参加了谈判，但过去战争的经验让德黑兰持怀疑态度。— 伊朗代表团提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终未能建立信心。— 美国现在理解了伊朗的原则，必须决定能否赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗将“权力外交”视为与军事抵抗并行、维护国家权利的关键工具，并将继续努力巩固其40天国防成就。— 感谢“友好和兄弟般的”巴基斯坦主办此次会谈。— 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的整体。我感谢所有英雄的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的建议，走上街头支持他们的孩子，并用祈祷陪伴我们，我也要对我在这些紧张的21小时谈判中的同事们说干得好。亲爱的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ Mihály Tóth-Szöke, a Fidesz member and mayor of the village of Bocsa in Bács-Kiskun County, voted for Tisza. ▪️ In a post on his Facebook page, he said his choice was “against Russian influence and in favor of European values.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043254526237434042/photo/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Peter Magyar says if Tisza wins he will cap the prime minister’s tenure at two terms. He says about 60 reports of election fraud have already come in. Turnout at 9 AM hit a record 16.98 percent, the National Election Office says. Orban said he came to win, while Peter Magyar framed the vote as a choice between East and West and warned Fidesz may stage fraud and provocations. Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 3.46% by 7 AM, a record and nearly double the same hour four years ago. The main race is Fidesz vs Tisza with Peter Magyar leading in polls, a pivotal vote for Hungary and for Orban. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 彼得·马扎尔表示，如果蒂萨党获胜，他将把总理任期限制为两届。他说已经收到约60起选举舞弊报告。国家选举办公室称，上午9点投票率达到创纪录的16.98%。欧尔班表示他是为赢而来，而彼得·马扎尔将此次投票定性为东西方之间的选择，并警告青民盟可能会制造舞弊和挑衅。匈牙利议会选举投票率在上午7点达到3.46%，创下历史新高，几乎是四年前同一时间的双倍。主要竞争是青民盟对阵蒂萨党，彼得·马扎尔在民调中领先，这对匈牙利和欧尔班来说是一次关键投票。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

April 11 was just the start of the Easter POW exchange, with more releases ahead, says Andriy Yusov, deputy head of Ukraine’s POW coordination HQ. He adds humanitarian initiatives were rejected, but the work goes on. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 布达诺夫表示，新的战俘交换可能在本周末进行。乌克兰战俘协调总部副主任安德烈·尤索夫表示，4月11日只是复活节战俘交换的开始，未来还会有更多释放。他补充说，人道主义倡议被拒绝了，但工作仍在继续。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ U.S.-Iran talks have ended without success, with no peace agreement reached. Vance stated this is worse news for Tehran than for Washington. 📌 “They chose not to accept our terms — we worked for 21 hours. We had substantive discussions… The bad news is we failed to reach an agreement.” 🟦 Vance appears unmoved by what he described as misleading rhetoric from Iran’s leadership, which he suggested believes it holds the advantage. 📌 “The simple fact is we need clear confirmation that they will not pursue nuclear weapons or the capabilities to rapidly develop them.” 🇮🇷 Iran also confirmed that negotiations in Islamabad ended without a deal, blaming Washington’s “excessive demands” for the lack of progress. 🟥 Reports indicate the main points of contention were transit rights in the Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s nuclear program. 🇺🇸 U.S. negotiators have already left Pakistan after the high-stakes talks collapsed, leaving key disputes unresolved. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : #突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 美伊谈判以失败告终，未达成和平协议。万斯表示这对德黑兰来说比对华盛顿来说是更糟糕的消息。 📌 “他们选择不接受我们的条件 — 我们工作了21个小时。我们进行了实质性讨论……坏消息是我们未能达成协议。” 🟦 万斯似乎对伊朗领导层所谓的误导性言论不为所动，他认为伊朗领导层认为自己占据优势。 📌 “简单的事实是，我们需要明确确认他们不会寻求核武器或快速开发核武器的能力。” 🇮🇷 伊朗也证实伊斯兰堡的谈判没有达成协议，并将进展缓慢归咎于华盛顿的“过分要求”。 🟥 报告显示，主要争议点是霍尔木兹海峡的过境权和伊朗的核计划。 🇺🇸 在高风险谈判破裂后，美国谈判代表已经离开巴基斯坦，关键争议仍未解决。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 Five parties are participating in Hungary’s parliamentary elections, but the main contest is between the opposition Tisza and the ruling Fidesz. ▪️ Voter turnout is relatively high, with queues already forming at some polling stations in Budapest. ▪️ Final vote counting is expected to be completed no later than April 18. text: WarTranslated Ukraine’s General Staff says Russia racked up 2,299 ceasefire violations from 4 pm to 7 am, including 28 assaults, 479 shelling incidents and 1,792 Lancet, Molniya and FPV strikes. No missiles, glide bombs or Shaheds. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 An hour after the truce began, Russian propagandists predictably claim "Ukraine broke it by hitting Nova Kakhovka." https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰总参谋部表示，从下午4点到上午7点，俄罗斯违反停火协议2299次，包括28次袭击、479次炮击和1792次柳叶刀、Molniya和FPV无人机打击。没有导弹、滑翔炸弹或沙赫德无人机。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043228142857269491/photo/1 停火开始一小时后，俄罗斯宣传人员不出所料地声称“乌克兰通过袭击新卡霍夫卡破坏了停火”。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042970712235749846/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 At least 30 people died in a stampede at Haiti’s Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot after a gathering promoted on TikTok, which drew a large crowd including school-age children as young as 12. Heavy rain reportedly triggered panic during the event. Officials say most of the victims died from asphyxiation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 海地米洛的拉费里埃城堡发生踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡。此前 TikTok 上宣传的一次聚会吸引了大量人群，其中包括年仅12岁的学龄儿童。据报道，大雨在活动期间引发了恐慌。官员称大多数受害者死于窒息。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel At least 30 people, many of them school-age children as young as 12, were killed in a stampede at the Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot, Haiti, after heavy rains triggered panic at a gathering advertised on TikTok, the Miami Herald reports, citing local officials. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据《迈阿密先驱报》援引当地官员的话报道，海地米洛的拉费里埃城堡发生踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡，其中许多是年仅12岁的学龄儿童。此前 TikTok 上宣传的一次聚会因大雨引发恐慌。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043224125200646160/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国的“要求太多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗浓缩铀的权利以及“其他问题”。国家电视台报道称：“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和不合理要求阻碍了谈判的进展。”

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：准确地说，他们在这里拒绝了什么？ JD 万斯：我们需要看到一个肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求能够使他们迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：美伊谈判失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们军队将每美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束了。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD 万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗人弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD 万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议 — 我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更糟糕的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在佛罗里达州参加 UFC 活动，而与伊朗的谈判在巴基斯坦破裂。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方继续遵守停火协议。

text: Trump reposts after failed talks with Iran: The Trump card the president holds if Iran won’t bend: a naval blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普在美伊谈判失败后转发：如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中掌握的王牌：海军封锁。

text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，由于数周战争后的“不信任气氛”，对与美国达成协议没有期望。他说：“我们不应该期望在一次会议上就达成协议，”并补充说，虽然找到了一些共同点，“但在两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧。”

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布根据其联合战略防御协议，向阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地东区部署约13000名巴基斯坦士兵和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举动，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对一个国家的攻击将被视为对另一个国家的攻击。@wfwitness

text: After 21 hours of negotiations in Pakistan, JD Vance said the U.S. and Iran failed to reach an agreement. He said the U.S. made its terms clear, but Iran did not accept them.
text_zh: 在巴基斯坦进行了21小时的谈判后，JD 万斯表示美伊未能达成协议。他说美国明确了自己的条件，但伊朗没有接受。

text: 🇭🇺 Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举已经开始 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🚩 April 1961: Moscow metro passengers reading newspaper reports of Yury Gagarin's space flight. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🚩 1961年4月：莫斯科地铁乘客阅读尤里·加加林太空飞行的报纸报道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇳 Russia does not yet have a preference for a candidate for the post of the new UN Secretary-General. The election campaign is just gaining momentum, Kirill Logvinov, the director of the Department of International Organizations of the Russian Foreign Ministry, told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇳 俄罗斯外交部国际组织司司长基里尔·洛格维诺夫告诉俄新社，俄罗斯目前还没有新任联合国秘书长职位的首选候选人。竞选活动才刚刚开始升温。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
